preflight.note: Created before changing release or conformance version records.

acceptance_criteria.text: Version, specification, conformance, README, dashboard, and release decision consistently identify RepoPact 2.2.0.
Governance validation, the full regression suite, conformance suite, derived-artifact checks, and distribution build pass on the release tree.
The release is merged, tagged v2.2.0, uploaded directly to PyPI from the exact locally validated artifacts because GitHub Actions publishing is billing-blocked, and externally verified.
ForgeLink advances from the interim commit pin to the formal 2.2.0 release and retains canonical dashboard enforcement.
